name: Chocolate Applesauce Cake
recipeIngredient: 2 cups unsweetened applesauce, warmed to room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Spray a 7 x 12-inch baking dish with Pam cooking spray.
3. Combine the melted chocolate and applesauce in a large bowl.
4. Add sugar, flour, and baking soda to the mixture. Stir until well combined.
5. Pour the batter into the prepared baking dish.
6. Bake for 25 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean when lightly touched.
